articles.title: James Carville Cackles About $TRUMP Fans’ Massive Memecoin Losses: ‘A Good Thing for America’ - Yahoo
articles.description: Veteran political strategist James Carville appeared to delight in reports of the massive losses for customers of President Donald Trump's memecoin.
articles.content:
Veteran Democratic Party political strategist James Carville appeared to delight in reports of the massive losses for customers of President Donald Trump‘s memecoin in a video for his Politicon.
